info.name: JaspertReport — Multi-Tenant Engine
info.description:
Postman collection for testing the JaspertReport multi-tenant report engine.

Prerequisites:
  1. Start the app: ./mvnw spring-boot:run -Dspring-boot.run.profiles=test
  2. Use token 'tok-A' for tenant 'acme' or 'tok-B' for tenant 'corp'
  3. Reports generate PDF by default; change 'format' to XLSX, DOCX, or HTML

IMPORTANT — H2 & JasperReports Field Mapping:
  JRXML fields are lowercase Strings. H2 returns column types based on VALUES.
  Use quoted string values for all columns to avoid type mismatch (null values).
  UNION ALL avoids JSON double-quote escaping issues in Postman raw body.

Tenants:
  - acme: token=tok-A, reports=SimpleReport,MasterReport,DetailReport,ventas,stock,test_report
  - corp: token=tok-B, reports=SimpleReport
